title: Barbers
description: Provide barbering services, such as cutting, trimming, shampooing, and styling hair; trimming beards; or giving shaves.

tasks.text: Clean and sterilize scissors, combs, clippers, and other instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drape and pin protective cloths around customers' shoulders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut and trim hair according to clients' instructions or current hairstyles, using clippers, combs, hand-held blow driers, and scissors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Question patrons regarding desired services and haircut styles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean work stations and sweep floors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply lather and shave beards or neck and temple hair contours, using razors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record services provided on cashiers' tickets or receive payment from customers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Shape and trim beards and moustaches, using scissors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform clerical and administrative duties such as keeping records, paying bills, and hiring and supervising personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stay informed of the latest styles and hair care techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Suggest treatments to alleviate hair problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend and sell lotions, tonics, or other cosmetic supplies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide skin care and nail treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep card files on clientele, recording notes of work done, products used and fees charged after each visit.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Curl, color, or straighten hair, using special chemical solutions and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide face, neck, and scalp massages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
